global_description: A small, slender bird with an olive-green back and pale underparts. It has a rounded head, short bill, and long wings. The plumage is smooth with subtle streaks, and the tail is slightly forked.

part_details.head: Rounded with olive-green feathers and a short, pointed bill.
part_details.wings: Long and narrow, olive-green with subtle streaks.
part_details.tail: Slightly forked, olive-green, matching the wings.
part_details.underparts: Pale, contrasting with the darker back.

spatial_relations: The wings extend from the sides of the body.
The tail is positioned at the rear, slightly forked.
